title: The Purchase Of America (ft. Michael Pillsbury & Josh Rogin)
summary: This interview explores China's long-term strategy to displace America as the global superpower, featuring discussions with China experts Michael Pillsbury and Josh Rogin about elite capture, economic warfare, and the CCP's systematic efforts to undermine US institutions. The conversation covers topics from TikTok's data collection to Chinese influence operations, the COVID-19 origins debate, and what the US should do to counter these threats.
